title: Colysis ovata

The genus Colysis is native to tropical Asia, with the species being commonly found in regions such as Southeast Asia and India. This classification provides a framework for understanding the evolutionary relationships between Colysis ovata and other related fern species.

intro: Colysis ovata, also known as Colysis ovata (C. ovata), is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. This plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including inflammation and fever, due to its potential health benefits in reducing oxidative stress and modulating the immune system.
